impact: Untracked legacy worker artifact `workers/dist/consumer.js` logs the first 200 characters of malformed queue bodies, which could expose PHI, identifiers, or secret material if the stale worker is reused before T-080 removes superseded artifacts.
resolution: Resolved by T-080: removed the superseded untracked workers directory and added /workers/ to .gitignore so the old ECS worker artifact cannot be accidentally revived from this branch.
title: Superseded worker artifact logs raw malformed queue bodies
